explanation: The user's instruction is to clean the mug. Since the mug is currently on top of the sink basin (sinkbasin_1), I first need to go to that location. After going there, I pick up the mug. To clean it, I turn on the faucet (faucet_0) to ensure water is available. Then, I pick up the mug again and place it back in the sink basin to clean it. This sequence ensures the mug is properly cleaned by being submerged in water, which is implied by the cleaning action. The plan follows the standard cleaning procedure: pick up, place in sink, turn on water, and re-place.
